claim: 67% of AI usage in large codebases is comprehension, not code generation
actionable: Before prompting an agent to implement, spend time understanding the existing codebase architecture and context to avoid misaligned mental models
source_title: The AI Skill I Rely On Daily — Priscila Andre de Oliveira, Sentry

claim: A 'catch me up' skill with 6 exploration modes (architecture, convention, feature trace, syntax, testing, history) helps agents understand codebases before planning
actionable: Create a skill that structures comprehension questions into exploration modes covering these six areas to help agents systematically understand unfamiliar codebases
source_title: The AI Skill I Rely On Daily — Priscila Andre de Oliveira, Sentry

claim: A misaligned mental model is the primary source of 'slop' code in AI-driven development
actionable: Align your understanding with the agent's understanding before allowing it to plan and implement—verify comprehension through dialogue
source_title: The AI Skill I Rely On Daily — Priscila Andre de Oliveira, Sentry

claim: Approving and understanding AI research before planning and implementation prevents downstream failures
actionable: Implement a three-step loop: understand what the agent found, steer if misaligned, then let it plan and implement
source_title: The AI Skill I Rely On Daily — Priscila Andre de Oliveira, Sentry
